message:
feat: show cost, model name, and agent ID in ThreadPanel header

- Add pricing utility (web/src/utils/pricing.ts) with model pricing
  table, cost computation, and formatting
- ThreadPanel header now shows: agent ID (full), cost ($X.XX), and
  concrete model name (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-20250514)
- App.tsx passes agentStats to ThreadPanel for model/token data
- Cost uses subtree-aggregated tokens from useTokenUsage
- Updated existing tests to pass required agentStats prop
